description: Get the information of all contacts in LightTalk.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of all contacts; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Look up a user's unique ID (UID) by their display name in LightTalk.

name.description: The display name of the contact in LightTalk.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is the UID string; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Send a message to a specific contact in LightTalk using their UID.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the recipient in LightTalk.

content.description: The text content of the message to send.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output may confirm delivery; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Retrieve the current user's own unique ID (UID) in LightTalk.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is the current user's UID; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Fetch the chat history with a specific contact in LightTalk.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the contact whose chat history to retrieve.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of message records; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Retrieve a paginated list of contacts from LightTalk. Each page contains up to 10 contacts.

page.description: The page number (starting from 1) to fetch contacts from. Each page returns at most 10 contacts.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of up to 10 contacts for the requested page; on failure (e.g., invalid session), output contains an error message.

description: Delete the entire chat history with a specific contact in LightTalk.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the contact whose chat history should be deleted.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms deletion; on failure (e.g., UID not found), output contains an error message.

description: Delete a specific message in a chat with a contact in LightTalk.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the contact whose chat contains the message.

mid.description: The unique message ID (MID) of the message to delete.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms deletion; on failure (e.g., session not found, message not found, or insufficient permissions), output contains an error message.

description: Block a contact in LightTalk by their unique ID (UID).

uid.description: The unique identifier of the contact to block.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms the contact was blocked; on failure (e.g., contact not found or already blocked), output contains an error message.

description: Unblock a contact in LightTalk by their unique ID (UID).

uid.description: The unique identifier of the contact to unblock.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms the contact was unblocked; on failure (e.g., contact not found or not currently blocked), output contains an error message.

description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific contact in LightTalk.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the contact.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output includes contact details (e.g., name, status, blocked state); on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Fetch all public moments (posts) published by a specific contact in LightTalk.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the contact whose moments to retrieve.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of all moments; on failure (e.g., contact not found), output contains an error message.

description: Retrieve the most recent K moments published by a specific contact in LightTalk.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the contact whose moments to retrieve.

k.description: The number of latest moments to fetch (must be a positive integer).

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of up to K most recent moments; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Fetch a specific moment by its index from a contact's timeline in LightTalk.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the contact who posted the moment.

index.description: The zero-based index of the moment in the contact's moment list.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is the moment object; on failure (e.g., invalid index or contact not found), output contains an error message.

description: Like a specific moment posted by a contact in LightTalk.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the contact who posted the moment.

moid.description: The unique moment ID (MOID) of the moment to like.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms the like action; on failure (e.g., moment not found or already liked), output contains an error message.

description: Post a comment on a specific moment in LightTalk.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the contact who posted the moment.

moid.description: The unique moment ID (MOID) of the moment to comment on.

content.description: The text content of the comment.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms the comment was posted; on failure (e.g., invalid moment or empty content), output contains an error message.
